faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Our cockroach extermination services in Hewlett typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Hewlett residents. Understanding that cockroach infestations require urgent attention, we prioritize rapid response times throughout Nassau County and the Five Towns area.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Hewlett homes?
faqs.answer: Hewlett properties most commonly experience German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, American cockroaches in basements and crawl spaces, and Oriental cockroaches near damp areas. Our treatments are customized based on the specific species infesting your property.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can discuss pet-friendly and child-safe treatment options during your free inspection.
